name: Sweet sea you’ve followed me
description:
“You really like the ocean don’t you?”

“...yeah, love it...”

“Dear what happened to you?”

”I fell earlier, I’m fine...”

”Why... Can’t I ever just live... Normally.”

“...”

Perseverance, persistence, need, desperation. All of that, just to live. The toll to take another step is only driven higher, while the being who sets it, watches effortlessly. Mistakes have been made before. It’s only a matter of time until one does her in. Prayers, charms, diagnoses, wishful thinking, medication, planning, avoiding... It’s done nothing, and will continue to do nothing, no matter the faith she places in it. Suppose it’s impossible to stop something you cannot comprehend.

(Artist)
creator: Goose_Man
